title: hydRate
description: Cross-platform app for finding and rating public water fountains and bathrooms. Built on a scalable Node.js / PostgreSQL backend on AWS.

title: Statement engine
description: Parallelized financial statement generation engine in C#. Cut processing time by 80–90% for monthly and quarterly client reporting.

title: Income allocation engine
description: Auditable income allocation engine with operation-tracking framework and AG Grid frontend. Composable accounting workflows.

title: Regex comprehension study
description: Experimental web app studying the efficacy of regex comprehension tools. Co-authored a research paper on the findings.

title: CI/CD pipeline
description: Template GitLab CI/CD pipeline for Kotlin API development. Faster, more reliable deployments across teams.

title: Lantern
description: Accounting MVP for small business owners. Distilled their financial health into digestible insights.

title: OpenAir assistant
description: Slack-integrated time tracking tool MVP that streamlined employee reporting.

title: YOLO object detection
description: PyTorch implementation of you-only-look-once object detection from scratch.

title: TapIn!
description: Social media sharing tool prototype for quick content drops between friends.

title: BLE LEDs
description: Bluetooth-controlled Arduino LED strip with a companion mobile app.

title: AHB convolver
description: Verilog AHB-connected 2D convolver module prototype for hardware-accelerated image processing.

title: Microcontroller pong
description: Pong-style game running on a microcontroller, with discrete inputs and a small display.
